name: Black Currant & Red Currant Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Line 6 tart tins, each measuring 2-inches deep by 2-inches in diameter, with shortcrust pastry made from wholewheat flour.
3. Mix the black and red currants with honey and chopped sweet cicely.
4. Fill the prepared pastries with the fruit mixture.
5. Cover each tart with foil and place them on a baking sheet.
6. Bake for 25 minutes.
7. Allow the tarts to cool completely.
8. If desired, whip cream and pipe it onto the tarts.
9. Decorate with glace cherries or angelica.
